case_title: CTI II, LLC VS. CAPITAL MAILING SERVICES INC.

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD (TRANSACTION ID # 14362050) FILED BY PETITIONER CTI II, LLC HEARING SET FOR FEB-20-2015 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS IT WAS INCUMBENT UPON THE RESPONDENT TO HAVE TAKEN ACTION TO ADDRESS RESPONDENT'S CONCERNS REGARDING THE ARBITRATION. PETITIONER SHALL SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER AND PROPOSED JUDGMENT TO THE COURT FOR SIGNATURE. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE DAWN GHENO, CSR #7489; DEPT. 302. (302/EHG)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Feb-20-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JOHN DOUGLAS MOORE of Henn, Etzel & Moore, Inc., Tel No. (510) 893-6300 appearing for Petitioner CTI, II, LLC;
Atty. BRET R. ROSSI, Tel No. (916) 442-6200 appearing telephonically for Respondent Capital Mailing Services, Inc.

RULING - Though a courtesy copy was never provided to the Court in compliance with the local rules, the Court agreed to review Respondent's scanned opposition papers today. After the Court reviewed Respondent's opposition papers, counsel for parties made their oral arguments to the Court. Matter was submitted. The Court ruled as follows: PETITIONER CTI II, LLC'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. The Court finds it was incumbent upon the Respondent to have taken action to address Respondent's concerns regarding the arbitration. PETITIONER SHALL SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER AND PROPOSED JUDGMENT TO THE COURT FOR SIGNATURE. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
